list.name: activity
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT s.site_type::text FROM monitoring.sites s JOIN monitoring.fact_site_event f ON f.site_id = s.site_id ORDER BY 1;

list.name: vo
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(f.owner),''),'Unknown') AS vo FROM monitoring.fact_site_event f JOIN monitoring.sites s ON s.site_id = f.site_id WHERE ('${activity:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR s.site_type::text = '${activity:text}') ORDER BY 1;

list.name: site
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT s.description FROM monitoring.sites s JOIN monitoring.fact_site_event f ON f.site_id = s.site_id WHERE ('${activity:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR s.site_type::text = '${activity:text}') AND ('${vo:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(f.owner),''),'Unknown') = '${vo:text}') ORDER BY 1;

targets.rawSql: SELECT   COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(f.owner),''),'Unknown') AS vo,   INITCAP(s.site_type::text) AS type,   COALESCE(NULLIF(STRING_AGG(DISTINCT (    CASE       WHEN s.description ~ '.*-([A-Z]{2})-.*' THEN regexp_replace(s.description, '.*-([A-Z]{2})-.*', '\\1')       WHEN s.description ~ '.*-([A-Z]{2})$' THEN regexp_replace(s.description, '.*-([A-Z]{2})$', '\\1')       WHEN s.description ~ '.*\\.([A-Za-z]{2})$' THEN UPPER(regexp_replace(s.description, '.*\\.([A-Za-z]{2})$', '\\1'))       ELSE NULL     END  ), ', '), ''), 'Unknown') AS country,   TRIM(BOTH ', ' FROM CONCAT(    CASE WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN f.energy_wh IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0 THEN 'Energy, ' ELSE '' END,     CASE WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN f.cfp_g IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0 THEN 'CO2, ' ELSE '' END,     CASE WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN f.ci_g IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0 THEN 'Carbon Intensity, ' ELSE '' END,     CASE WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN f.pue IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0 THEN 'PUE, ' ELSE '' END  )) AS metrics_reported,   COALESCE(SUM(COALESCE(dn.amountofdatatransferred,0)),0) AS volume_of_data_bytes,   TO_CHAR(MIN(f.event_start_timestamp), 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS active_since FROM monitoring.fact_site_event f JOIN monitoring.sites s ON s.site_id = f.site_id LEFT JOIN monitoring.detail_network dn ON dn.event_id = f.event_id WHERE $__timeFilter(f.event_start_timestamp)   AND ('${activity:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR s.site_type::text = '${activity:text}')   AND ('${vo:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(f.owner),''),'Unknown') = '${vo:text}')   AND ('${site:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR s.description = '${site:text}') GROUP BY 1,2 ORDER BY 2,1;
